name: quantakrypto-tools
description: Open-source post-quantum readiness tooling by quantakrypto — scanner, MCP server, conformance battery, and CI action.
author: Dandelion Labs <hello@dandelionlabs.io> (https://dandelionlabs.io)

scripts.//test:coverage: Node built-in coverage. Requires Node >=22: node --test only expands the root glob natively on Node 21+, and Node 20's coverage reporter crashes on the cross-package dist source maps that qscan/mcp/action pull in. The CI 'coverage' job pins Node 22. --test-coverage-exclude keeps node_modules/dist out of the figure.
